next_steps: Perform orbital biopsy of the involved optic nerve sheath or intraconal tissue
Systemic evaluation for multi-organ involvement (IgG4-RD, e.g., pancreas, salivary glands, lymph nodes)
Initiate empiric high-dose intravenous corticosteroid therapy
Evaluate for underlying rheumatologic or vasculitic processes (e.g., ANCA, ANA, ENA, anti-dsDNA)
Consult rheumatology and ophthalmology for co-management
